allow: Bash(cat /home/nathan/git/wrapper-uber-eats-api/uber_eats_api_doc/openapi.json | jq -r '.paths | to_entries[] | select\(.value | has\("get"\)\) | "\\\(.key\): \\\(.value.get.summary // .value.get.description // "no summary"\)"' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Load openapi.json \(Stores API\)
with open\('/home/nathan/git/wrapper-uber-eats-api/uber_eats_api_doc/openapi.json'\) as f:
    spec = json.load\(f\)

print\("=== openapi.json \(Marketplace Store API\) ==="\)
for path, methods in spec['paths'].items\(\):
    if 'get' in methods:
        summary = methods['get'].get\('summary', 'N/A'\)
        print\(f"GET {path}"\)
        print\(f"  Summary: {summary}\\n"\)
EOF)
